bullets.body: **MITRE ATT&CK v19 lands Apr 28 — Defense Evasion (TA0005) splits into Stealth + Impair Defenses; v5.4 framework adds AI-agent context poisoning / tool invocation abuse / MCP server compromise / malicious agent deployment as named techniques** — Structural validation of the agentic-AI threat-class. v19 does not yet ship a dedicated skill-marketplace-poisoning sub-matrix; that's the inferred next step. Apache 2.0 spec available; agentskills.io is the open-standard endpoint.

citations.label: GitHub - mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills (754 structured skills mapped to ATT&CK / NIST CSF 2.0 / ATLAS / D3FEND / NIST AI RMF)

Direct inference-target for the Future-1 prediction.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > vLLM

bullets.body: **vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) → carry into Apr 28-30: torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default / Model Runner V2 / day-one Gemma 4 support across E2B / E4B / 26B MoE / 31B Dense; v0.18.0 (late March) gRPC serving + GPU NGram speculative decoding + FlexKV cache offload backend; v0.20 expected to expand Transformers v5 compatibility** — Three releases in 14 days; the upgrade path to v0.20 lands the cross-arch Transformers v5 wave on top of CUDA 13.0.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > SGLang

bullets.body: **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — still unpatched into Apr 30 (11+ days post-disclosure); v0.5.10 ships exploitable; cross-server class to vLLM CVE-2025-61620 + LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 + Apr 28's CVE-2026-40967 Spring AI FilterExpressionConverter (same model-tooling-layer injection shape)** — Maintainer-coordination yielded no upstream fix; PoC `github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE` continues to circulate; CERT/CC VU#915947 active.

citations.label: The Hacker News - SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE via Malicious GGUF Model Files

bullets.body: **SGLang TurboQuant integration — PR #21419 in-tree (`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`); follow-up #23134 fused-Triton-decode/extend kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput vs ~1% on the original implementation** — Carry-forward; the standing reference for the compressed-KV-cache deployment-knob trend.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > KV-Cache Compression Stack

bullets.body: **TurboQuant (Google Research, ICLR 2026) — 3.5-bit-per-value KV-cache compression matching FP16 on LongBench / Needle-in-a-Haystack with no retraining; 6x compression, 8x faster attention; community ports in MLX + Triton + vLLM + SGLang** — Standing carry-forward.

citations.label: Google Research - TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression

bullets.body: **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) — shared asymmetrically-compressed KV-pool for multi-agent LLM inference; int8 keys + 3-bit TurboQuant-MSE values via HF DynamicCache injection** — First multi-agent KV-cache architecture grounded on TurboQuant; carry-forward.

sections.category: AI Security > CVE / KEV / Threat Intelligence (CVSS ≥ 8.0)

bullets.body: **CISA KEV Apr 28 — adds CVE-2024-1708 ConnectWise ScreenConnect Path Traversal + CVE-2026-32202 Windows Shell Protection-Mechanism-Failure spoofing; May-12 federal deadline** — ConnectWise CVE-2024-1708 chained with CVE-2024-1709 (auth bypass, CVSS 10.0) for 14+ months; Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202 stems from incomplete patch for CVE-2026-21510, exploited as zero-day by APT28 since Dec-2025.

citations.label: CISA - Adds Two Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog (Apr 28)

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-40967 Spring AI FilterExpressionConverter Injection (CVSS 8.6, Apr 28) — first 2026 CVE squarely in the LLM-tooling supply chain at the RAG query plane** — Various FilterExpressionConverter implementations accept a filter-expression object and translate to vector-store query languages; keys and values are not properly escaped, enabling query alteration. Structurally the same shape as the SGLang Jinja2/SSTI primitive.

citations.label: TheHackerWire - CVE-2026-40967 Spring AI

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-3854 GitHub Enterprise Server RCE (CVSS 8.7, Apr 28) — single git push to any repo (including a self-created one) executes arbitrary commands; affects GitHub.com + all GHES releases prior to fixed versions** — Critical RCE in GitHub's internal git infrastructure; emergency patching across both SaaS and on-prem.

citations.label: Cipher Security - CVE-2026-3854: GitHub Enterprise Server RCE

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-34965 Cockpit CMS Authenticated RCE (CVSS 8.8, Apr 29)** — /cockpit/collections/save_collection endpoint fails to sanitize collection rules parameters; authenticated attacker injects arbitrary PHP code → arbitrary command execution.
